event: Theatrical stage set depicting Petrushka's chamber
symbols: starry chamber — an enclosed world of illusion and performance
crescent moon — the nocturnal, dreamlike quality of the theatrical space
curtains — the boundary between reality and theatrical fantasy
description: A theatrical stage design showing the interior of a small room with deep blue walls and curtains framing both sides. The ceiling and walls are decorated with stars against a dark background, and a crescent moon hangs at upper right. A puppet-like figure in white stands at center, gesturing dramatically. On the left wall hangs a small painting or window showing a dark silhouetted figure. On the right wall, another small framed image is visible. A scalloped golden border decorates the top. The floor is rendered in warm yellow and ochre triangular patterns.
